overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character walking through a futuristic space station lobby. The character approaches and passes a General Store counter with check-in stations visible, featuring clean modern architecture with teal and blue artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: space station lobby entrance with general store

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the lobby toward the General Store counter

notable_agents.action: standing near the entrance looking at a handheld device

entered.detail: illuminated signage above the store entrance reading GENERAL STORE
long service counter with glass display cases and dark wood paneling
waste disposal unit with blue CLEAN UP signage
large planters with palm trees against the stone wall
wall-mounted CHECK-IN signs in white lettering on dark background

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a futuristic indoor lobby with teal ceiling panels and marble flooring. A lone NPC stands near a clean-up station on the left as the character approaches the General Store counter. Large potted trees and multiple CHECK-IN signs are visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: general store service counter and check-in doorway

events.description: approaching the illuminated check-in doorway with blue accent lighting

agents.ego_description: passing the store counter and walking toward the doorway at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: futuristic doorway with blue LED accent lighting and metallic frame

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the General Store counter where a clerk stands behind the glass display. The lobby opens toward a futuristic doorway with blue lighting on the right wall. The previous lobby elements fall behind as the character approaches the transition point to another area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile futuristic lobby that transitions from a wide reception area toward a glowing corridor. It begins with the character walking across marble flooring beneath teal ceiling panels, passing a lone NPC near a clean-up station. As the character approaches the General Store counter, the view expands to reveal large potted trees and multiple check-in signs in the background. The scene then shifts as the camera moves past the store clerk behind a glass display, leaving the main lobby elements behind. Finally, the perspective opens toward a futuristic doorway accented by blue lighting on the right wall as the character reaches the transition point to a new area.
